description_long: This hardware store is a two-story rectangular building with a flat roof and a modern, utilitarian facade. The front features large, rectangular windows on both floors and a wide double-door entrance, partially sheltered by a projecting awning. The exterior is clad in a light tan or beige brick texture, with a paved area in front that could serve as a parking or loading zone. One side of the building is mostly solid, while the other side has a vertical strip of glass blocks or patterned windows, adding visual interest and natural light. The rear and side elevations are plain, with minimal openings or architectural details. The overall design is functional, with an emphasis on accessibility and visibility for customers.
description: A two-story, tan brick hardware store with large front windows, a double-door entrance, and a flat roof, featuring a modern, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Front view showing large windows on both floors, a double-door entrance, and a projecting awning above a paved area.
description_view_1: Side view revealing a mostly solid wall with a small section of the paved area and minimal architectural features.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain facade with windows and a vertical strip of glass blocks or patterned windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with a solid wall and a glimpse of the paved area and entrance structure.
attribute_storefront_layout: The storefront features a wide double-door entrance beneath a projecting awning, flanked by large rectangular windows on both floors. The front is organized symmetrically, with a paved area in front and minimal decorative elements.
